title: backend: Reject unsupported Jaeger tracing endpoint
author: harrshita123

findings.description: Branch contains two merge commits from main ('Merge branch main into fix-5799-jaeger-endpoint' at 54db56aa and 95a03698). A second merge commit was added since the 2026-06-04 REQUEST_CHANGES. Must rebase onto current main and clean history before merge.
Commit subject missing SubArea segment: 'backend: Reject ...' should be 'backend: config: Reject ...' or 'backend: telemetry: Reject ...' per project convention.
